BY THIS ORDER, THE COURT DOES NOT DETERMINE THE VON'S DIVISION IS A DEFENDANT IN THIS ACTION. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED AND ORDERED STRICKEN EXCEPT AS TO ASSERTIONS OF PRIVILEGE AS TO THE PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
William L. Verick, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories Set One, And To Compel Production Of Documents Set One
Off Calendar Apr-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
DAVID H. WILLIAMS, ESQ., (510)271-0826, FOR PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY, MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION
WILLIAM VERICK, ESQ., (707)268-8900, FOR PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY, MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION
ROBERT J. MAXWELL, ESQ., (415)956-2828, FOR DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY, SAFEWAY, INC.

HEARING WAS HAD. AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS MODIFIED. PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One; And To Compel Production Of Documents, Set One, is granted as to all California Safeway stores, including the Von's Division, as Safeway supplies the products that are the subject of this litigation, for the one year period preceeding the filing of this complaint. By this order, the court does not determine the Von's Division is a Defendant in this action. Defendant's objections are overruled and ordered stricken EXCEPT AS TO ASSERTIONS OF PRIVILEGE AS TO THE PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported. (610/EAH)
